title: Assign ascending numbers with status change
excerpt: I am trying to automate the assigning of a number to an item as its status changes from the default to “Signed In.” I have an automation that populates the date an item is signed in and I would like to do something simil…

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to automate the assigning of a number to an item as its status changes from the default to “Signed In.” I have an automation that populates the date an item is signed in and I would like to do something similar with a number that increases with each case of the status changing from the default to “Signed In.” I am not sure if an automation or a formula could be used to achieve this. For example, I want the first item to signed in to be number 1, the next instance of an item being signed in to be numbered 2, and so on.

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Desiree, this almost works, but it acts independently and I can only put digits in for the value to increase by. Therefore, each time the automation runs it populates my number column with 1 rather than 1 and then 2. Thanks for the suggestion.

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I will look into this!

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Did it worked? With more detail maybe I can help. See ya!

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Joe, my company decided to download the Auto ID app as @basdebruin recommended. Yes, so far it its working for us!
